layers.name: background_canvas
layers.description: The off-white, slightly textured paper background of the traditional Chinese ink painting, providing a neutral base for the landscape.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A blank, slightly textured off-white rice paper canvas, traditional Chinese ink painting style.

layers.name: distant_mountains
layers.description: The dark, rugged peaks of distant mountains rendered with varying shades of black ink, appearing behind the mist and creating a sense of depth.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Distant, rugged mountain peaks rendered in traditional Chinese ink wash style, using various shades of black ink, on a transparent background.

layers.name: mist_and_clouds
layers.description: Ethereal, soft-edged white and light grey mist and clouds that weave through the mountains, creating atmospheric depth and obscuring parts of the landscape.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Soft, ethereal white and light grey mist and clouds, traditional Chinese ink wash style, on a transparent background.

layers.name: foreground_landscape
layers.description: The lower hills, winding path, river with waterfalls, and dense clusters of smaller trees in the valley, rendered in ink and subtle green washes.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Lower hills, a winding path, a river with waterfalls, and dense clusters of smaller trees in a valley, traditional Chinese ink wash style with subtle green washes, on a transparent background.

layers.name: pavilion_and_pines
layers.description: A small, traditional Chinese pavilion nestled on a prominent hill, surrounded by large, gnarled pine trees with dark needles and distinctive branches.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A small, traditional Chinese pavilion with a tiled roof, nestled on a prominent hill, surrounded by large, gnarled pine trees with dark needles and distinctive branches, traditional Chinese ink wash style, on a transparent background.

layers.name: calligraphy_and_seals
layers.description: Vertical lines of elegant Chinese calligraphy in black ink, accompanied by two red square seals, located in the upper right corner of the painting.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Elegant vertical lines of Chinese calligraphy in black ink, with two square red seals below, traditional Chinese ink painting style, on a transparent background.
